channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: The UK's music tourism industry was worth a staggering £11.2…
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description: The UK's music tourism industry was worth a staggering £11.2 billion in 2025, according to data published by UK Music
item.content:encoded: The UK's music tourism industry was worth a staggering £11.2 billion in 2025, according to data published by UK Music

item.title: For the rest of the world, Motown was great pop music. But f…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: For the rest of the world, Motown was great pop music. But for Detroit, it was a deep source of pride and identity that continues to resonate today.
item.content:encoded: For the rest of the world, Motown was great pop music. But for Detroit, it was a deep source of pride and identity that continues to resonate today.

item.title: Berlin’s "beloved living room venue" kwia has confirmed that…
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description: Berlin’s "beloved living room venue" kwia has confirmed that it will close at the end of July after suffering rent hikes that have made it unsustainable to continue operating
item.content:encoded: Berlin’s "beloved living room venue" kwia has confirmed that it will close at the end of July after suffering rent hikes that have made it unsustainable to continue operating

item.title: The four biggest U.S. airlines control close to three-quarte…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The four biggest U.S. airlines control close to three-quarters of the market. Industry critics say consolidation is bad for passengers, but airlines say there's still healthy competition. n.pr/3R7h4HR
item.content:encoded: The four biggest U.S. airlines control close to three-quarters of the market. Industry critics say consolidation is bad for passengers, but airlines say there's still healthy competition. n.pr/3R7h4HR

item.title: The singular singer's third album finds a message worthy of …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The singular singer's third album finds a message worthy of her instrument: Great romances are defined not by what you want, but by the act of wanting. n.pr/4eSYVH0
item.content:encoded: The singular singer's third album finds a message worthy of her instrument: Great romances are defined not by what you want, but by the act of wanting. n.pr/4eSYVH0

item.title: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the fede…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the federal government to cut internet costs. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr called for ending this program before Donald Trump tapped him for the job. n.pr/4ydyljh
item.content:encoded: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the federal government to cut internet costs. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr called for ending this program before Donald Trump tapped him for the job. n.pr/4ydyljh

item.title: During the last election, when struggling to find a memorabl…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: During the last election, when struggling to find a memorable attack line against Kamala Harris, Trump eventually landed on "Comrade Kamala." n.pr/4vY9izq
item.content:encoded: During the last election, when struggling to find a memorable attack line against Kamala Harris, Trump eventually landed on "Comrade Kamala." n.pr/4vY9izq

item.title: 【特集】くるりインタビュー 初のフルオーケストラ公演を前にした2人の心境は？ ・課題になりそうなポイントは……
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【特集】くるりインタビュー

初のフルオーケストラ公演を前にした2人の心境は？

・課題になりそうなポイントは……
・The Beatlesはオーケストラそのもの
・岸田繁が思う“くるりの魅力”
https://natalie.mu/music/pp/billboardclassics-quruli

#くるり
item.content:encoded:
【特集】くるりインタビュー

初のフルオーケストラ公演を前にした2人の心境は？

・課題になりそうなポイントは……
・The Beatlesはオーケストラそのもの
・岸田繁が思う“くるりの魅力”
https://natalie.mu/music/pp/billboardclassics-quruli

#くるり

item.title: New suspected cases of Ebola have been reported in parts of …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: New suspected cases of Ebola have been reported in parts of Congo that were previously unaffected, the government said, signaling the continued spread of the disease beyond the epicenter in Ituri. n.pr/4wv7TA1
item.content:encoded: New suspected cases of Ebola have been reported in parts of Congo that were previously unaffected, the government said, signaling the continued spread of the disease beyond the epicenter in Ituri. n.pr/4wv7TA1
